model.jaffle_shop.dim_customers.name: dim_customers
model.jaffle_shop.dim_customers.description: Customer dimension table with order summary
model.jaffle_shop.dim_customers.raw_code:
{{ config(materialized='table', schema='marts') }}

WITH customers AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ ref('stg_customers') }}
),

orders AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ ref('stg_orders') }}
),

customer_orders AS (
    SELECT
        customer_id,
        COUNT(*) AS order_count,
        SUM(amount) AS total_amount
    FROM orders
    GROUP BY customer_id
)

SELECT
    c.customer_id,
    c.first_name,
    c.last_name,
    c.email,
    COALESCE(co.order_count, 0) AS order_count,
    COALESCE(co.total_amount, 0) AS total_amount
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN customer_orders co ON c.customer_id = co.customer_id
model.jaffle_shop.dim_customers.compiled_code:
WITH customers AS (
    SELECT * FROM "postgres"."public"."stg_customers"
),

orders AS (
    SELECT * FROM "postgres"."public"."stg_orders"
),

customer_orders AS (
    SELECT
        customer_id,
        COUNT(*) AS order_count,
        SUM(amount) AS total_amount
    FROM orders
    GROUP BY customer_id
)

SELECT
    c.customer_id,
    c.first_name,
    c.last_name,
    c.email,
    COALESCE(co.order_count, 0) AS order_count,
    COALESCE(co.total_amount, 0) AS total_amount
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN customer_orders co ON c.customer_id = co.customer_id

test.jaffle_shop.unique_stg_orders_order.name: unique_stg_orders_order_id
test.jaffle_shop.unique_stg_orders_order.compiled_code:
select
    order_id as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from "postgres"."public"."stg_orders"
where order_id is not null
group by order_id
having count(*) > 1

test.jaffle_shop.not_null_stg_orders_ord.name: not_null_stg_orders_order_id
test.jaffle_shop.not_null_stg_orders_ord.compiled_code:
select order_id
from "postgres"."public"."stg_orders"
where order_id is null
